---
title: "Evolution of Top Names"
output: html_document
---

## Setup
```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)


data <- read_csv("../data.csv")
colnames(data)


data <- data %>%
  mutate(annais = as.numeric(as.character(annais))) %>%
  filter(!is.na(annais)) %>%
  filter(preusuel != "_PRENOMS_RARES") %>%
  mutate(decade = (annais %/% 10) * 10)

data_agg <- data %>%
  group_by(decade, preusuel) %>%
  summarise(total = sum(nombre, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")

top_names <- data_agg %>%
  group_by(preusuel) %>%
  summarise(total_all = sum(total)) %>%
  arrange(desc(total_all)) %>%
  slice_head(n = 10)

data_top <- data_agg %>%
  filter(preusuel %in% top_names$preusuel)

ggplot(data_top, aes(x = decade, y = total, color = preusuel)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Evolution of Top Names by Decade",
       x = "Decade",
       y = "Number of Births")
